publishedAbstract: - Alerts seem to be false because **alertmanager** and **cluster monitoring operator** pods are running. ~~~ READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE alertmanager-main-0 3/3 Running 0 6d alertmanager-main-1 3/3 Running 0 6d alertmanager-main-2 3/3 Running 0 6d cluster-monitoring-operator-6f5fbd6f8b-rp7tj 1/1 Running 0 7d grafana-857fc848bf-r8dhc 2/2 Running 0 7d kube-state-metrics-88548b8d-grhrx 3/3 Running 0 6d node-exporter-8pm6z 2/2 Running 0 6d node-exporter-bldxj 2/2 Running 0 6d node-exporter-jbk8g 2/2 Running 0 6d node-exporter-jhv88 2/2 Running 0 6d node-exporter-k7kc8 2/2 Running 0 6d node-exporter-pc8zj 2/2 Running 2 6d node-exporter-vbx29 2/2 Running 0 6d node-exporter-x5wbj 2/2 Running 0 6d prometheus-k8s-0 4/4 Running 1 7d prometheus-k8s-1 4/4 Running 1 7d prometheus-operator-7855c8646b-mjgfk 1/1 Running 0 7d ~~~
publishedTitle: AlertmanagerDown and clusterMonitoringOperatorDown alerts fired due Prometheus database not enough free space in RHCOP 3.11
